goal: Activate the delayed provider feed per the approved P6 contract: human-initiated bounded capture of delayed quotes into the research read model with explicit delay-label propagation and P5.2-aligned PIT semantics. Not realtime, not streaming, not a persistent connection; no order-decision surface.
network_note: Bounded human-approved capture only, after source contract digest and work-unit digest approval with host-egress admission. Zero network in verification commands.
provider_calls_note: Remains false until activation; each approved request is accounted in the acceptance JSON.
implementation_slices: source contract finalization for the chosen endpoint (delay definition, cadence, schema, coverage, licence, digest policy) in the P5.1 style
first human trial capture with caller-owned raw evidence (sha256, bytes, timestamps, encoding probe) proving delay semantics during market hours
runtime boundary amendment: delay label propagation into read model and UI, staleness threshold, cutoff and available_at PIT semantics
deterministic normalization of captured responses into the read model with delay labels
research-only UI presentation of delayed data with explicit delay/staleness labelling, never presented as current
deterministic fixture tests with no network and no wall-clock dependence; offline P1-P4 replay
acceptance evidence JSON with provider_calls accounted per approved request
activation_requirements: human approval of the source contract digest for the chosen endpoint
human approval of this exact work-unit digest
trial capture proving delay semantics recorded before any scheduled capture
p4_research_closure.py passing before and after implementation
offline replay of deterministic fixture tests
cannot_claim: realtime or streaming data of any kind
capture executed before source contract and work-unit digest approval with host-egress admission
order route, order command, order UI control, or order-decision surface
redistribution of feed data beyond the local machine
licence terms inherited from the P5 EOD bulk slice
